summary: Iteration 55: Step-wise Document Management - All features working. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All 5 features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 tested the new step-wise document management system. All features working: (1) Client Doc Completion tab shows 8 steps with document counts and progress (12%), (2) Step 1 shows Passport (Upload) and Photo (approved) with mandatory tags, (3) CM Step Documents tab shows step-wise docs with Add Doc button per step, (4) CM can request additional documents in separate section, (5) CM can only remove CM-added docs (not admin-defined). Backend APIs all working: GET /api/step-documents/case/{id}, POST request-step-doc, POST request-additional, POST remove-step-doc.

client_step_documents.details: Doc Completion tab shows 8 steps with document counts. Step 1 (Profile Creation) shows Passport (Upload) and Photo (approved). Each doc has mandatory/optional tag. Progress bar shows 12% (1/8 uploaded).

cm_document_manager.details: Step Documents tab shows CMDocManager component. After selecting a case, shows step-wise docs with Add Doc button per step. 3 steps visible with document counts. CM-added docs show 'You added' badge with delete button.

cm_add_step_document.details: Clicking Add Doc opens 'Request Document for Step X' dialog with Document Name, Document Type, Description, Due Date, Expiry Date, Validity fields. Request Document button submits the request.

cm_additional_document.details: Additional Doc button opens 'Request Additional Document' dialog with Document Name, Tag (Mandatory/Optional/Conditional), Notes for Client. Additional Requests section shows pending requests.

backend_step_documents_api.details: All 4 endpoints working: GET /api/step-documents/case/{id} returns steps with documents structure, POST request-step-doc adds doc to step, POST request-additional adds to separate section, POST remove-step-doc removes CM-added doc.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails

cm_step_documents.add_doc_buttons: 4 Add Doc buttons (1 per step + Additional)
